settings.title: Notifications
settings.description: Configure how and when you receive notifications.

preferences.title: Notification Preferences
preferences.subtitle: Choose which notifications you want to receive and how they are delivered.

globalToggle.title: Global Channel Settings
globalToggle.description: Disable a channel entirely to stop all notifications through it, regardless of individual preferences below.
globalToggle.pushDescription: Receive push notifications in your browser

push.title: Push Notifications
push.description: Receive push notifications in your browser when important events occur.
push.denied: Push notifications are blocked. Please enable them in your browser settings.
push.notConfigured: Push notifications are not configured on the server.
push.testSuccess: Test notification sent! Check your device.
push.testError: Failed to send test notification. Please try again.

telegram.title: Telegram
telegram.description: Connect your Telegram account to receive notifications via the WirkSam bot.
telegram.loginDescription: Click the button below to connect your Telegram account instantly.
telegram.authFailed: Telegram authentication failed. Please try again.
telegram.startBotHint: To receive messages, make sure you have started the bot:
telegram.waitingForVerification: Click the button above, then press Start in Telegram. This page will update automatically.
telegram.sendCode: Send the following code to the WirkSam bot on Telegram:
telegram.notConnectedWarning: Telegram notifications are enabled but your account is not connected. Connect below to receive messages.
